notableEvents.label: Juan Brito GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Juan Brito grounds into a double play, shortstop Jorge Mateo to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Kyle Manzardo out at 2nd. Juan Brito out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Bo Naylor pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Bo Naylor flies out to center fielder Mauricio Dubón.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Ronald Acuña Jr. steals (3) 2nd base. Ronald Acuña Jr. to 3rd. Ronald Acuña Jr. advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by shortstop Brayan Rocchio.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Smith GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Smith grounds into a double play, second baseman Juan Brito to shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Mike Yastrzemski to 3rd. Ozzie Albies out at 2nd. Dominic Smith out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Smith rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Smith grounds into a double play, second baseman Juan Brito to shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Mike Yastrzemski to 3rd. Ozzie Albies out at 2nd. Dominic Smith out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Farmer pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Farmer doubles (1) on a line drive to left fielder Angel Martínez. Austin Riley scores. Ozzie Albies scores.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Farmer pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Farmer grounds out, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Rhys Hoskins.
